title: Subscribe to Quaker action alerts
desc: Subscribe to Quaker constituent-action emails. Pacifist-rooted, focused on Pentagon and immigration policy.

title: Sign on to an Auburn Seminary faith-leader campaign
desc: Sign on to faith-leader campaigns. Auburn trains multi-faith clergy in social justice and movement leadership.

title: Sign on to a Hindus for Human Rights action
desc: Counter Hindu nationalism in US politics. Sign on as a Hindu or ally; Modi's allies have major Trump-admin ties.

title: Sign on to a Sikh Coalition civil-rights action
desc: Sign Sikh Coalition civil-rights actions. Hate-crime response, religious-discrimination, and racial-profiling work.

title: Sign up as a volunteer attorney
desc: Sign up as a volunteer attorney. Match takes 20 minutes; cases include immigrants, election workers, federal whistleblowers.

title: Volunteer as an attorney
syn: Lawyers' Committee for Civil Rights cases
desc: Hours go to immigrants and federal workers fighting Trump-era retaliation. Lawyers especially — 20-min match.

title: Find pro bono cases (formerly Pro Bono Net)
desc: Find pro bono cases. Volunteer-attorney matching for civil-legal cases — most need procedural help, not litigation.

title: Volunteer your tech skills
desc: Volunteer your tech skills. Local brigades build tools for governments and nonprofits — replace shitty .gov UX.

title: Sign up as a tech volunteer
desc: Sign up as a tech volunteer. Project matching for devs, designers, and PMs supporting democracy-org tooling.

title: Volunteer your professional skills
desc: Volunteer your professional skills (design, marketing, ops, finance) to nonprofits. 1–10 hour bites; remote-friendly.

title: Volunteer as a translator
desc: Volunteer as a translator for asylum cases. Crisis-language work — hours can save someone from deportation.

title: Volunteer as a linguist
desc: Volunteer as a linguist for crisis-response work. Less-resourced languages especially needed for refugee work.

title: Sign on to a Doctors for America healthcare campaign
desc: Sign on to Doctors for America campaigns. Medical voices that move members of Congress on Medicaid + ACA.

title: Train as asylum-evaluation clinician
syn: PHR trains MDs for asylum medical exams
desc: Train as an asylum-evaluation clinician. Forensic medical exams for asylum cases — without one, deportation odds spike.

title: Sign up to run for office (STEM)
syn: 314 Action helps scientists run for office
desc: Sign up to run for office (STEM). Trump's anti-science agenda needs scientists in office — they'll train you.

title: Volunteer with Authors Against Book Bans
desc: Volunteer with Authors Against Book Bans. Authors, librarians, readers showing up at school-board meetings.

title: Join Concerned Archivists Alliance
desc: Archivists organizing to preserve federal records as Trump scrubs them. Need archivists, devs, and metadata pros.

title: Volunteer on detained-immigrant cases
desc: Volunteer on detained-immigrant cases. Free training + case match. Pro bono representation triples release odds.

title: Take the anti-coup civil-resistance pledge
desc: Take the anti-coup civil-resistance pledge. Public commitment to nonviolent action if Trump refuses to leave office.

title: Carry KYR cards for ICE encounters
desc: Print + carry Know-Your-Rights cards. Pull one out if ICE approaches — works for citizen and non-citizen alike.

title: Send email-your-rep
desc: Email-your-rep on consumer protection and corporate accountability fights. Their tracker is updated weekly.

title: Send anti-militarism email
desc: Send an anti-militarism email to your reps. Win Without War targets Pentagon budget votes specifically.

title: Send Christian-rooted email-your-rep
desc: Send a Christian-rooted email-your-rep. Religious framing changes which Republicans actually engage.

title: Send Quaker constituent email
desc: Send a Quaker constituent email. FCNL writes the script; email lands at your senator's office in seconds.

title: Email targeting specific ICE facilities
desc: Email actions against specific ICE facility operators. Detention Watch identifies who to pressure for closures.

title: Email your school board re: book bans
desc: Email your school board against book bans. Pre-written templates work — boards capitulate when pressure hits.

title: Sign up for a workshop
desc: Workshops most arrest-action groups send people through. Get de-escalation and jail-support before you need them.

title: Sign up for a training
desc: Direct-action training. Ruckus prepared protesters at Standing Rock and Occupy. Sign up for a workshop.

title: Apply to a cohort
desc: Apply with your group for movement-strategy training. Best for orgs that need help going from reactive to strategic.

title: Take a course
desc: Take an organizer course. Sliding-scale tuition; classes on de-escalation, racial justice, and base-building.

title: Enroll in a free training
desc: Learn what to actually do when ICE detains a neighbor or a Nazi accosts someone on transit. Free, 60–90 min.

title: Enroll in anti-coup training
desc: Enroll in anti-coup training. Free workshop calendar — what to do if Trump refuses a peaceful transfer of power.

title: Enroll in programs
desc: Storied southern movement school — MLK and Rosa Parks trained here. Apply for residential or virtual programs.

title: Sign up for a curriculum
desc: Sign up for just-transition + ecological-justice curriculum. Climate work that connects to labor and racial justice.

title: Take an abolitionist study course
desc: Take an abolitionist study course. Free curricula; reading groups online and in cities. Replaces police 101 with care 101.

title: Sign up for a reading group
syn: Showing Up for Racial Justice reading group
desc: Sign up for an abolitionist reading group. Critical Resistance is OG abolition — Angela Davis co-founded it.

title: Apply to be a paid poll worker
desc: Apply to be a paid poll worker. Local elections are short on workers; you get paid + protect access for hours of your day.

title: Take a Know Your Rights training
desc: Take a Know Your Rights training for ICE encounters. Live calendar; bring your block, household, or workplace.

title: Sign up for kindness-toned voter postcards
desc: Write hand-written postcards to swing-state voters. Personal mail still cuts through algorithm-fried discourse.

title: Become a pen pal to a detained migrant
syn: Connect with those in need — your letters bring hope and human contact behind detention walls
desc: Become a pen pal to a detained migrant. Mail breaks isolation in ICE detention; bilingual letters welcome.

title: Volunteer (LGBTQ youth digital crisis support)
syn: Trevor Project 24/7 crisis volunteer role — paid training, chat / text / phone shifts
desc: Volunteer for LGBTQ youth digital crisis support. 24/7 chat/text/phone — paid training, ongoing support.

title: Practice rest-as-resistance prompts
syn: Tricia Hersey's Nap Ministry prompts — burnout is fascism's goal, sleep is the counter
desc: Practice rest-as-resistance prompts. Tricia Hersey's free library — burnout is the goal of fascism, sleep counters it.

title: Find + amplify your local mutual aid
syn: US-wide mutual-aid network map — money, supplies, on-the-ground neighbors near you
desc: Find + amplify your local mutual aid network. Map of US-wide groups — money, supplies, people on the ground.

title: Subscribe + share Capital B (Black-led)
syn: Stay informed on underreported Black stories Support investigative journalism that challenges the mainstream narrative
desc: Subscribe + share Capital B coverage. Black-led investigative work that mainstream outlets don't cover.

title: Subscribe + share The 19th* (gender + politics)
syn: Stay informed on gender issues and amplify voices fighting for rights
desc: Subscribe + share The 19th. Gender + politics reporting on abortion, trans rights, and women's health under Trump.
